subtasks.description: Evaluate the hotfix deployment request against change management and maintenance window policies. Check if engineer u_7732 has authorization to deploy outside the approved maintenance window, and assess compliance with the change control policy for the prod-us-east-1 environment.

plan.cost_rationale: Single policy_action subtask at mid tier. The query explicitly requests a governance decision (policy evaluation) regarding an out-of-window production deployment. This requires checking multiple policy dimensions: (1) engineer authorization level, (2) maintenance window rules, (3) change control approval requirements, and (4) environment-specific constraints. Mid tier is appropriate for multi-clause policy reasoning. No additional subtasks needed because the query does not request data gathering from multiple distinct sources—it is asking directly for a compliance evaluation against the policy registry. The policy agent will return the determination (approve/deny/escalate) with rationale.

output.reason: Engineer u_7732 holds 'engineer' role (below senior-engineer requirement per POL-401), and deployment is attempted Tuesday 02:15 UTC, outside approved maintenance window (Sat 10PM–Sun 6AM UTC per POL-403) without CAB approval (POL-402).
applied_constraints: Require role elevation to senior-engineer or higher
Obtain CAB approval for out-of-window deployment
Or defer deployment to next approved maintenance window (Sat 22:00 - Sun 06:00 UTC)
